hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_name // "tool"' | { IFS= read -r msg; runectl notify warn "claude needs permission: $msg"; }

hooks.prompt: You are a senior code reviewer. Read .claude/agents/reviewer.md for instructions. Review each for idiom violations per the rules. Return {"ok": true} if all pass, or {"ok": false, "reason": "violations found: ..."} with details.

You are a Go idiom reviewer. Read .claude/agents/go-idioms.md for instructions. Review each for idiom violations per the rules. Return {"ok": true} if all pass, or {"ok": false, "reason": "violations found: ..."} with details.

hooks.command: jq -r '.message // "claude finished"' | { IFS= read -r msg; runectl notify success "$msg"; }
